items.title: New preprint: [CoPeP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00253) on continual pretraining for protein language models

items.title: Graphical Interpretation of Data using ArangoDB
items.description: A technical walkthrough of modeling and querying graph data with ArangoDB — from setup to traversal queries and visualization.

items.title: An Introduction to Lifelong Supervised Learning
items.description: A comprehensive primer on lifelong/continual supervised learning — survey of the field covering task-incremental, class-incremental, and domain-incremental settings.

items.title: Fast CSP and Learning-based Minesweeper Solver
items.description: AI solver using Constraint Satisfaction Problems, XGBoost, and Deep Q-Learning — achieving 92% win rate on standard boards.

items.title: CoPeP: Benchmarking Continual Pretraining for Protein Language Models
items.description: A benchmark for evaluating continual pretraining strategies in protein language models.
items.authors: **Authors:** D. Patil, **P. Malviya**, M. Reymond, Q. Fournier, S. Chandar

items.title: Interpolate: How Resetting Active Neurons can also improve Generalizability in Online Learning
items.description: Investigating how resetting active neurons improves generalizability in online learning settings.
items.authors: **Authors:** **P. Malviya**, D. Patil, M. Hashemzadeh, Q. Fournier, S. Chandar

items.title: Experimental Design for Nonstationary Optimization
items.description: An experimental design framework for nonstationary optimization problems.

items.title: Manifold Metric: A Loss Landscape Approach for Predicting Model Performance
items.description: Using loss landscape geometry to predict model generalization without held-out data.

items.title: Lookbehind-SAM: k steps back, 1 step forward
items.description: An efficient extension to Sharpness-Aware Minimization that leverages historical gradient information.

items.title: Exploring the Plasticity of Neural Network for NLP Tasks in Continual Learning
items.description: Investigating plasticity loss in neural networks for NLP tasks under continual learning.

items.title: Promoting Exploration in Memory-Augmented Adam using Critical Momenta
items.description: A memory-augmented optimizer that stores and retrieves critical momenta to promote exploration in the loss landscape.

items.title: Torque-Aware Momentum

items.title: TAG: Task-based Accumulated Gradients for Lifelong Learning
items.description: A gradient accumulation method for continual learning that prevents catastrophic forgetting. Also presented at ICML 2021 Workshop.

items.title: An Introduction to Lifelong Supervised Learning
items.description: A survey and introduction to the field of lifelong supervised learning.

items.title: Feature Diversity in Self-Supervised Learning
items.description: Investigating the role of feature diversity in self-supervised representation learning.

items.title: A Causal Approach for Unfair Edge Prioritization and Discrimination Removal
items.description: Using causal inference to identify and remove discriminatory edges in decision systems.

items.title: A Causal Linear Model to Quantify Edge and Cumulative Unfairness
items.description: A linear causal model for quantifying and prioritizing sources of unfairness in ML pipelines.

items.title: Contextual Care Protocol using Neural Networks and Decision Trees
items.description: A neural network and decision tree hybrid for contextual healthcare protocol recommendation.
items.authors: **Authors:** Y.P. Sinha, **P. Malviya**, M. Panda, S.M. Ali
